title: memo-init Tool Usage Map (WI-2-05)
description: Which harness tool is used by which pipeline skill, and whether its absence blocks a rollout. Keyed by tool name; every key MUST be a member of the 42-tool inventory (no orphan name). usedBy line-evidence is harvested deterministically by grep over repos/core/skills/ (T026 part b), never by prose-grep. critical:true means a missing tool is a rollout BLOCKER (RULE 3). MCP tools (Playwright browser_*) are NOT keyed here — they are not harness-inventory tools; their conditional need is carried in playwrightNote.

playwrightNote.description: the Playwright-MCP dependency (browser_*), conditional on UI memos — carried out-of-band because browser_* are MCP tools, not inventory entries

tools.description: map of inventory tool name -> usage record

critical.description: true = absence is a rollout BLOCKER (RULE 3); false = memo/research-phase or advisory tool

criticalNote.description: why the tool is (or is not) rollout-critical, incl. conditional (when-axis) qualifiers
